name: Tomato Sauce II ( October 1992 )
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and cut them into quarters (do not remove skins or seeds).
2. Place the tomatoes and the rest of the ingredients in a stockpot or saucepan.
3. Cook covered for 10 minutes.
4. Simmer uncovered for 1 hour.
5. Pass through a mill or sieve.
6. Pour back into the pan and cook uncovered for 5 minutes.
